defaults.promptPrefix: Luxury editorial framing, grounded realism, premium wardrobe direction.

influencerModels.name: Sora Vale
influencerModels.description: Sharper motion, urban energy, and modern campaign poses designed for high-frequency social output.

defaults.promptPrefix: Modern movement, social-first crop, tactile city atmosphere.

influencerModels.name: Lena North
influencerModels.description: Closer portrait-led coverage with clean lighting and consistent facial framing across reference reuse.

defaults.promptPrefix: Precision beauty styling, clean skin detail, premium campaign finish.

influencerModels.name: Mara Quinn
influencerModels.description: High-contrast evening scenes, social glamour, and cinematic lounge compositions.

defaults.promptPrefix: Night-time premium mood, cinematic highlights, tactile depth.
